title: One-Way by Ferry: Karaköy to Kadıköy
description: Spend a themed day in Istanbul: Karaköy Coast Park, Kadıköy, Kadıköy Bazaar, Moda Coast Park, and the Walking Path.
notes: Take a short stroll along the Bosphorus waterfront before boarding the ferry.
Enjoy a cup of tea and a simit on the ferry, and watch the seagulls as you cross to the other side.
Get lost in the lively streets of the bazaar.
Finish off with a coastal walk towards Moda.
